message:
fix(codegen): Fix unused block label in assertRaises with nested with/compound stmts

The assertRaises error-catching labeled blocks (`__ar_blk_N`) were being
generated but never used when:
1. Multiple context managers (e.g., `with assertRaises(), assertWarns():`)
   are parsed as nested with_stmt
2. Body contains compound statements (if/for/while/try/match) with
   expressions inside their branches

Changes:
- Add `canUseLabeledBlock()` to check if body only has expr_stmt/raise_stmt
  at top level (or in nested unittest with_stmt). Returns false for
  compound statements that have nested expressions we can't wrap.
- Handle nested with_stmt (from multiple context managers) by recursively
  processing the nested unittest context manager's body
- Only generate labeled blocks when all expressions can be wrapped with
  `break :__ar_blk_N`, avoiding "unused block label" compile errors

This fixes compile errors like:
  error: unused block label
      _ = __ar_blk_17: {
          ^~~~~~~~~~
